title: HG Limescale Remover Concentrate, Sink, Tap, Glass & Toilet Cleaner, Bathroom Descaler – 500ml
features: HG Limescale Remover Concentrate: This powerful limescale remover is ideal for the removal of stubborn limescale and stains from bathroom tiles, floors, shower doors, taps, sinks, toilets and screens
Safe for bathroom surfaces: This wall, floor and shower screen cleaner is safe to use on most surfaces, including glass, plastic, chrome, mirrors, aluminium, porcelain, ceramic, stone and more
Keeps taps and sinks looking their best: The easy to use scale remover removes rust, stains, grime, soap scum and dirt, as well as verdigris and scale in the shower plus urine stains from the toilet
Restores your shower spray action: The strong descaler helps to quickly and easily remove limescale deposits from poorly spraying shower heads, to restore the flow whilst polishing the metal
1 x HG Limescale Remover Concentrate, 500ml. Discover the full range of HG cleaning products, from HG toilet cleaner to HG grout cleaner, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays
description: Product Description HG Limescale Remover Concentrate is a powerful cleaner for the safe removal of stubborn limescale and deposits in your bathroom. This effective and easy-to-use limescale cleaner leaves a wonderful shine on tiles, shower doors, screens, work surfaces, sinks or taps. The ultra-strong scale remover can also be used for descaling poorly spraying shower heads, as well as being a fast-acting rust, verdigris and urine stain remover for toilets. The sink, shower and bath cleaner is tough on scale and grime but gentle on surfaces, making it safe to use on chrome, glaze, plastic or grouting. Includes: 1 x HG Limescale Remover Concentrate (500ml) How to use: 1. Depending on the amount of dirt/scale, use undiluted or diluted with water to a ratio of 1:10. 2. Apply the strong limescale remover with a sponge. 3. Leave to work for a few minutes, wipe off with water and rinse. 4. Submerge clogged showerheads for 30 minutes and then scrub with a brush. Keep this HG cleaner out of children's reach. Always read the label. Discover the HG professional range of specialist household cleaning products, including HG mould remover, multi-purpose cleaners and all-surface cleaner sprays for your home, office or outside space. Ingredients cleaner Box Contains 1 x 500ml Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: HG International b.v., P.J. Oudwe 41, 1314 CJ Almere, The Netherlands. See more
